    Resources

    Where to go next.

    Internships, papers, professional societies, and the videos we recommend you to watch. Curated for students who want to actually go do this work.

    Opportunities

    Internships & research programs

    • Magee-Womens Research Institute — RSTP (undergrad) ↗
    • Magee-Womens — High School Summer Internship ↗
    • NIRH — Reproductive health policy jobs ↗
    • Stanford MCHRI — Drug & Device Development Training ↗
    • Harvard MHTF — Jobs & internships in maternal health ↗
    • NIH Summer Internship Program (SIP) ↗
    • MSK Immunology Research Summer Program (IRSP) ↗
    • La Jolla Institute for Immunology — LJIdea ↗
    • UNC Collaborative for Maternal & Infant Health — Internships ↗
    Societies

    Professional societies & research hubs

    • Society for Women's Health Research ↗
    • Society for Maternal-Fetal Medicine (SMFM) ↗
    • ACOG — American College of Obstetricians & Gynecologists ↗
    • American Society for Reproductive Immunology (ASRI) ↗
    • International Society for Immunology of Reproduction (ISIR) ↗
    • MITxHarvard Women's Health Research Hub ↗
    • Women's Health Research at Yale ↗
    • Women's Health Research Institute (UBC) ↗
    Reviews

    Papers & reviews to read first

    • Erlebacher (2013) — Immunology of the Maternal-Fetal Interface ↗
    • Moffett & Colucci (2014) — uNK cells: active regulators ↗
    • Liu et al. (2017) — Trophoblast–immune interactions ↗
    • Gomez-Lopez et al. (2014) — Immune cells in term and preterm labor ↗
    • Boulanger et al. (2024) — Immunologic aspects of preeclampsia ↗
    • Munn et al. (1998) — IDO and prevention of fetal rejection ↗
